reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
I bought this speaker in March of 2024. Since then, it has been a complete disappointment. I bought it thinking bose would make a quality speaker that would be easy to use and sound great. But, I have just been completely dumbfounded by the quality of this speaker. 
The sound when it is turn on is.... meh initially, There is an app that needs to be downloaded to set the equalizer. It does not have the deep bass I was expecting from a bose speaker with the initial settings. Once the app is downloaded, setting the equalizer isn't difficulty, but the little tab is constantly in the way on the home screens. I have to constantly move it out of the way to do other things on my phone. This is minuscule compared to the charging process.
It took me 3 or 4 times to figure the charging process out for this speaker. You would expect a typical portable speaker to be charged when plugged at any level of charging. When it first got below 10% I plugged it in to charge, left in plugged in for a few hours and it only got to 70%. I let it charge overnight and it did not raise above 70%. I used it some more and let the battery completely drain. I charged it again and it FINALLY went to 100%. 
Through trial and error I figured out, in order to charge the battery to 100% I have to let it die completely. If I attempt to charge it any earlier, it will only charge to somewhere between 40 and 70% and will not go any higher. I have tried different fast chargers and cable to no avail. It continues to be the same. 
Another aspect with the charging, Once it starts, if the charging is interrupted because the cable is moved and become dislodged, the charging cycle stops. Regardless of reengaging the charging cable the battery will not charge beyond the interrupted point. 

Overall, I am very disappointed in this product and wish I had chosen a different portable speaker.

reviews.title: Another Bose Disappointment
reviews.text: This is the second Bose product that has disappointed.  Sound quality is poor.  Volume is very limited.  I have to keep it on maximum volume at small parties and it is still hard to hear.  I have had other devices of similar size and lower cost that filled the room and was clear.  I listen to pod cases through it and it sounds muffled.  Easier to just play the pod cast from my phone than use the speaker.  Speaker also regularly disconnects my phone for reasons I still do not understand.  If I listen for 1-2 hours, I am often having to reconnect 2 to 3 times and having to turn the device off and on.  There are may other better products on the market that are cheaper.

reviews.title: Sleek Design with Suprisingly Dynamic Sound
reviews.text:
I bought this speaker to play music out on my patio or bring to the pool. I live in an area with frequent strong storms and I'm impressed with how this speaker has held up against some surprise storms. Though, I'm not sure I would recommend leaving it out in a storm.

The sound is surprisingly loud and dynamic for it's size. My only gripe is that the app support for it is a bit lacking. I noticed that Bose has several apps in the app store for different devices and this one a a bit more limited than some of the apps for other products.

reviews.title: AMAZING product, except for one fatal flaw...
reviews.text:
Micro USB? Really, Bose??? You released a product in the year 2021 that only charges via Micro USB. Unbelievable. In my experience, it only works 10% of the time, even with the official cable provided with the product. Tried the charging cradle bought from the Bose website to see if that would fix it, and it bumped it up from 10% to 25% of the time it'll work. 
I hate to give this product a bad review, because overall it's not bad! Amazing Bose sound quality, hooks up well to another similar speaker for stereo audio, fills a room in every direction with sound. It's just this darn charge port that's the issue! I can't get my money's worth out of the product if I can't stinkin' charge the thing!

reviews.title: Could have been better for the price.
reviews.text: This thing sounds excellent. Can I believe it. In your house or in the backyard sounds great. But if you take it in your vehicle your interior absorbs all this the sound and it doesn't work very well there. One thing I was wanting to know is this thing water resistant? A print and the little booklet is so small I cannot read it so I don't know if the answer is in that? From what I could see and read instructions to get it operating. I didn't see anything about water resistant? Also would like to know how far could I drop this and it not break? Oh yeah one other thing. It says it holds a charge for somewhere up to 8 hours or so? Not true. And I have not played it loud all the time. I can play it for maybe a couple hours? And it would say something like 60% or 50% power? If it was supposed to holy charge for 8 to 13 hours ? I don't think so from my experience? Oh yeah what other thing since you asked? The distance is no better than anything else that's out there for a lot less money. Of course I haven't tried all of these types of speakers. But the distance for this speaker is no better than the ultimate ears in my opinion. One of the things I read they bragged about that. I was a little bragged about longer battery life. Not true in my opinion but yes I would recommend this to someone because of the sound it's so much better than the rest of them I've tried.
